blocks.text: "xong" means "finished / done" — it indicates an action has been completed before moving on to the next one. It is placed right after the verb (or verb phrase); the next clause describes what happens after.

blocks.vi: Ăn cơm xong em rửa chén.
blocks.en: After finishing eating, I'll wash the dishes.

blocks.vi: Về nhà xong anh làm gì?
blocks.en: After getting home, what do you do?

blocks.vi: Chị lau nhà xong chị giặt đồ.
blocks.en: After finishing cleaning the house, I'll do the laundry.
